creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
It's been quite some time since this pr(1) was opened.
I'd also like to mention that I just up(dat|grad)ed
sysutils/lxterminal to version 0.4.0. If the author
of this report could try the new version and confirm
whether or not it fixed the reported problem. That
would be great.

Thanks!

--Chris
